title: Choose Instructions, Skills, Plugins, Hooks, or MCP · Threat Case: Skill Fit
summary: Route recurring agent needs to the smallest durable extension surface. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext skill fit increment in an extension-surface decision matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use a skill for a reusable workflow, expertise, scripts, references, or assets.
Use AGENTS.md or equivalent repository guidance for durable local conventions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Skill Fit evidence
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-skill-fit-1trma9: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Skill Fit into observable performance evidence.

agent-ext-skill-fit-1trma9:

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]

steps.title: Defend the Skill Fit model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Skill Fit applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use a skill for a reusable workflow, expertise, scripts, references, or assets.
